CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
CREATE TABLE more_numbers (c INT, d INT);
SELECT (SELECT a FROM numbers) + (SELECT c FROM more_numbers);
SELECT a + (SELECT d FROM more_numbers LIMIT 1) FROM numbers;
CREATE TABLE complex_values (e INT, f INT);
SELECT ((SELECT e FROM complex_values WHERE e < 15) + (SELECT f FROM complex_values WHERE f > 10));
CREATE TABLE large_numbers (g BIGINT, h BIGINT);
SELECT (a + b) * 2 FROM numbers JOIN more_numbers ON more_numbers.c = 5;
CREATE TABLE test_combination (x INT, y INT);
SELECT (AVG(a) + SUM(b)) AS total FROM numbers;
SELECT (SELECT MAX(a) FROM numbers) + (SELECT MIN(c) FROM more_numbers);
